title: Thai-Style Flatbread Wraps
description: A fusion dish that combines the flavors of Thailand with the simplicity of flatbread. This recipe is perfect for a quick and easy meal.
instructions: 1. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
2. Slice the cucumber and carrot into thin strips.
3. Grill the rustic flatbread for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until crispy.
4. Spread 1-2 tablespoons of Thai peanut sauce on each piece of flatbread.
5. Top with cucumber slices, carrot slices, and fresh cilantro.
6. Serve with a lime wedge on the side.
8. Cut the Turkish flatbread into smaller pieces to use as wraps.
9. Assemble the wraps by placing the grilled flatbread, vegetables, and cilantro inside.
